title: The Tokyo Convention Act, 1975
full_text: The Tokyo Convention Act, 1975 टोकियों कन्‍वेंशन अधिनियम,1975 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197520 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1975-05-08 Act Year: 1975 Short Title: The Tokyo Convention Act, 1975 Hindi Title: टोकियों कन्‍वेंशन अधिनियम,1975 Long Title: An Act to give effect to the Convention on offences and certain other acts committed on board aircraft. Ministry: Ministry of Civil Aviation Enforcement Date: 01-01-1976 Notification: 1st January, 1976, vide notification No. S.O. 5426, dated 17th December, 1975, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 01-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Tokyo Convention Act, 1975 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II DEFINITIONS CHAPTER III OFFENCES CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Application of criminal law to aircraft. Section 4. Provisions as to Extradition Act. Section 5. Powers of commander of aircraft. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. Provisions as to evidence in connection with aircraft. Section 8. Provisions as to documentary evidence. Section 9. Power to apply the provisions of Act with modifications to certain aircraft. Section 10. Contracting parties to Convention. Section 11. Power to treat certain aircraft to be registered in Convention country.
